findings.location: sections.s1 — アクションクラス heading
findings.description: The knowledge file writes "**アクションクラス**: `nablarch.fw.messaging.RequestMessage`", which implies the action class is or is identified as `nablarch.fw.messaging.RequestMessage`. The source does not state this. The action class is a user-implemented class that *receives* a RequestMessage argument; it is not RequestMessage itself. The source lists RequestMessage only as the input parameter type used by the action class.
findings.source_evidence: アクションクラスは、リクエストメッセージ(:java:extdoc:`RequestMessage<nablarch.fw.messaging.RequestMessage>`)を元に業務ロジックを実行し…
